title: Rename Login Page Title from Cookie Verification to DataTools App Login
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the login page title to display 'DataTools App Login' instead of 'cookie verification', so that the page looks professional and trustworthy.
description: The login page and passcode page had the browser tab title set to "cookie verification", which was flagged by a user as confusing. Changed to "DataTools App Login" for both pages.
acceptance_criteria: Login page browser tab title displays 'DataTools App Login'
Passcode page browser tab title displays 'DataTools App Login'
ux_changes: Browser tab title on login and passcode pages changed from 'cookie verification' to 'DataTools App Login'.
implementation_notes: Title updated on both login.php and the cookie/passcode page.
comment_summary: Waqar changed the title on both login and cookie pages as requested.
